nodes.label: Writeup Email Notifications
nodes.rationale: Approval-link emails are disabled by default (WRITEUP_SEND_APPROVAL_LINKS=false) until the Task 31 access page exists, so emails never contain dead links; the grant is still created and the raw token shown once in the UI. The raw token is used only transiently to construct the access URL and is never stored in notification metadata or logs. Owner notification email resolves in order: env var, then active email contact link, then skipped.

nodes.label: Resend Email Provider
nodes.rationale: The provider abstraction in src/lib/email/provider.ts isolates Resend, so swapping email providers requires updating one file without changing templates or send functions. All email env vars are server-only, never NEXT_PUBLIC_*.

nodes.label: writeup_email_notifications Table
nodes.rationale: Stores only template key, recipient, subject, status (sent/failed/skipped), provider message ID, and safe metadata; no token-containing content is ever persisted.

nodes.label: log_writeup_email_notification_public RPC
nodes.rationale: Security-definer RPC callable by anon, used exclusively by violets_portfolio server actions; it accepts only the two public template keys and derives portfolio_id from the request row to prevent forged inserts.
